seoTitle: Minmi vs Minnamurra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Minmi and Minnamurra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Minmi and Minnamurra.
heading: Minmi vs Minnamurra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Minmi, New South Wales and Minnamurra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Minmi has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Minnamurra (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Minmi or Minnamurra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Minmi has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Minnamurra scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Minmi scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Minnamurra scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Minmi or Minnamurra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Minmi has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
